title: Introduction to Algebra
description: A foundational course in algebra covering variables, equations, and basic problem-solving techniques.

title: Dinosaurs 101
description: Explore the fascinating world of prehistoric dinosaurs, their habitats, and extinction theories.

title: Watercolor Painting for Kids
description: Learn the basics of watercolor painting including color mixing, brush techniques, and simple landscapes.

title: Creative Writing Club
description: A weekly club where young writers explore storytelling, poetry, and creative expression.

title: Physics for Beginners
description: An introduction to fundamental physics concepts including motion, forces, and energy for young learners.

title: Chess Club for Beginners
description: Learn the rules and strategies of chess in a fun, competitive environment.

title: Spanish for Kids
description: Conversational Spanish course designed to introduce children to vocabulary, phrases, and culture.

title: Introduction to Coding with Scratch
description: Kids learn programming basics through MIT's Scratch platform, creating games and animations.

title: Young Scientists Lab
description: Hands-on experiments in chemistry and biology. Students conduct experiments and record observations.

title: Geometry Essentials
description: Master shapes, angles, theorems, and geometric proofs in this structured math course.

title: Ballet Basics
description: Introduction to classical ballet including barre work, center exercises, and basic choreography.

title: Book Club for Young Readers
description: A monthly book club where children discuss novels, themes, and characters in a guided setting.

title: Ocean Exploration
description: Dive deep into marine biology, ocean ecosystems, and conservation efforts through interactive lessons.

title: Advanced Python Programming
description: For teens ready to dive into Python: functions, OOP, file handling, and mini projects.

title: Sculpting with Clay
description: Students explore 3D art by sculpting animals, portraits, and abstract forms using air-dry clay.

title: Pre-Calculus Prep
description: Prepare for calculus with in-depth coverage of functions, trigonometry, and sequences.

title: Guitar for Beginners
description: Learn to play acoustic guitar — chords, strumming patterns, and simple songs.

title: Robotics Club
description: Build and program robots using LEGO Mindstorms and Arduino to complete obstacle challenges.

title: World History: Ancient Civilizations
description: Travel through time exploring Egypt, Greece, Rome, and Mesopotamia in this history overview.

title: Public Speaking Workshop
description: Overcome stage fright and develop confident, persuasive communication skills for academic and social settings.

title: Fraction Fun
description: A hands-on approach to learning fractions, decimals, and percentages with visual models.

title: Digital Art & Illustration
description: Create digital artworks using industry-standard tools like Procreate or GIMP.

title: Space Explorers
description: Journey through our solar system, galaxies, and the cosmos with interactive lessons and virtual telescopes.

title: Debate Team Prep
description: Sharpen critical thinking and argumentation skills by practicing structured debate formats.

title: Minecraft Engineering
description: Use Minecraft Education Edition to learn engineering, architecture, and creative problem-solving.

title: Introduction to Biology
description: Explore cells, genetics, ecosystems, and human body systems in this comprehensive biology introduction.

title: Cooking Science
description: Combine culinary arts with chemistry! Students learn why bread rises, how emulsification works, and more.

title: Piano Fundamentals
description: Learn to read sheet music and play beginner-level piano pieces with proper technique.

title: Film & Media Literacy
description: Analyze movies, news, and social media with critical thinking skills and media production basics.

title: Math Olympiad Training
description: Intense problem-solving practice for students preparing for AMC, MATHCOUNTS, or Math Olympiad competitions.

title: Cartoon Drawing
description: Learn to draw cartoon characters, comic strips, and expressive illustrations step by step.

title: Introduction to Chemistry
description: Discover atomic structure, chemical reactions, the periodic table, and basic lab safety.

title: Yoga for Kids
description: Fun and mindful yoga sessions focusing on flexibility, breathing, and body awareness.

title: Game Design Fundamentals
description: Design and prototype board games and simple video games, learning core design principles.

title: Environmental Science Club
description: Investigate environmental issues, conduct ecological surveys, and develop sustainability projects.

title: French for Beginners
description: Build foundational French language skills through conversation, vocabulary, and cultural exploration.

title: Statistics and Data Analysis
description: Learn to interpret data, create charts, and apply basic statistical methods to real-world problems.

title: Hip-Hop Dance
description: Learn popular hip-hop moves, freestyle techniques, and choreography in a high-energy dance class.

title: Storytelling with Animation
description: Create animated short stories using simple tools, learning the basics of animation and storyboarding.

title: Mythology and Folklore
description: Explore myths from Greek, Norse, Egyptian, and other world traditions with reading and discussion.

title: Drumming Basics
description: Learn rhythm, coordination, and basic beats on a full drum kit in a beginner-friendly setting.

title: Number Theory for Curious Kids
description: Explore prime numbers, divisibility, modular arithmetic, and number patterns.

title: Podcast Production
description: Plan, record, edit, and publish your own podcast — all technical and creative aspects covered.

title: Origami and Paper Crafts
description: Learn traditional and modern origami techniques and create impressive paper sculptures.

title: Entrepreneurship for Teens
description: Design a business idea, build a pitch, and learn business fundamentals — marketing, finance, and strategy.

title: Astronomy Club
description: Weekly stargazing sessions paired with lessons on constellations, planets, and telescopic observation.

title: Math for Everyday Life
description: Practical math skills: budgeting, percentages, measurements, and real-world problem solving.

title: Photography for Kids
description: Learn composition, lighting, and storytelling through photography using smartphones or digital cameras.

title: Typing and Keyboarding
description: Develop proper typing technique and increase typing speed and accuracy using fun online tools.

title: Mindfulness and Emotional Intelligence
description: Build self-awareness, manage emotions, and develop empathy through guided mindfulness practices.

title: Introduction to Economics
description: Understand supply and demand, markets, and basic economic principles through simulations and discussion.

title: Improv and Theater Games
description: Develop confidence, creativity, and collaboration through improvisation and theater games.

title: Early Math Explorers
description: Fun math for young learners: counting, patterns, basic addition and subtraction using manipulatives.

title: Web Design Basics
description: Learn HTML, CSS, and basic JavaScript to build your first website from scratch.

title: Science Fair Prep
description: Guided support for designing, conducting, and presenting a science fair project.
